description:
Create an empty database named 'ChemCorp_LCA' in openLCA. Establish a category hierarchy where 'Air emissions / Manufacturing' and 'Water emissions / Process effluent' are under 'Elementary flows', and 'Intermediates / Catalysts' and 'Intermediates / Solvents' are under 'Product flows'.

Create the following Elementary Flows (Mass flow property, unit 'kg'):
- 'Catalyst residue X-47, to air' in 'Air emissions / Manufacturing'
- 'Volatile organic compound mix A, to air' in 'Air emissions / Manufacturing'
- 'Sulfonate byproduct, to air' in 'Air emissions / Manufacturing'
- 'Heavy metal sludge, to water' in 'Water emissions / Process effluent'
- 'Thermal effluent, to water' in 'Water emissions / Process effluent'

Create the following Product Flows (Mass flow property, unit 'kg'):
- 'Palladium catalyst intermediate' in 'Intermediates / Catalysts'
- 'Reclaimed toluene solvent' in 'Intermediates / Solvents'
- 'Ethyl acetate solvent grade B' in 'Intermediates / Solvents'
